summary: Validated backend refactor (server.py 2056 lines -> modular structure with database.py, auth.py, models.py, routes/*). Wrote a focused smoke test (test_refactor_smoke.py) covering all 30 endpoints in the review request and ran the full backend test suite. Frontend smoke test confirmed admin/cashier/waiter PIN logins still work and route correctly. No regressions detected.

frontend.login_page_loads: PASS - PIN keypad with 0-9, CLR, backspace, Login button
frontend.admin_login_redirects_to_/admin: PASS - shows Admin Dashboard with Users, Outlets, Products, Inventory, Suppliers, Purchases, Customers, Orders, Reports, Accounts, Tables, Settings cards
frontend.cashier_login_redirects_to_/cashier: PASS - shows Cashier Terminal, products grid, Tables button visible (restaurant business_type), Held Orders count
frontend.waiter_login_redirects_to_/tables: PASS - shows Table Management with 10 tables (T1-T10)
frontend.tables_visibility_business_type: PASS - Tables menu visible when business_type=restaurant

test_execution.full_regression_suite: 120/120 passed (all backend tests across all iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now clean and minimal (~33 lines). Routes are well organised in /app/backend/routes/ with 17 modules. Models centralised in models.py. Auth helpers in auth.py. Database connection in database.py. Refactor is clean and maintainable.
Minor (non-blocking): Two pre-existing tests in test_api_endpoints.py and test_new_features.py use 'return' instead of assert and emit PytestReturnNotNoneWarning. Not introduced by this refactor.

success_rate.backend: 100% (120/120 tests passed; 30/30 smoke tests for refactored endpoints)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data (10 tables, products, orders)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactor verified - all endpoints accessible at the same paths after split into routes/*. test_refactor_smoke.py is a quick (~9s) regression for the 30 endpoints in the modular structure. Full suite (120 tests) takes ~210s. Business_type currently 'restaurant' so tables UI is visible.
